contentList.content: Origin: The Pale Elf
After countless years serving a cruel master, Astarion is finally free. Right?
Origin: The High Harper
A battle-hardened Harper veteran, Jaheira is a venerable champion against evil.
Origin: The Daughter of Darkness
Shadowheart is not like other Clerics, with training focused on faith and dexterity to fulfil the wishes of her dark Goddess.
Origin: The Githyanki Mind-Warrior
Fighting from the moment of her birth with a mind honed for superiority through violence, Lae'zel keeps her mind and body sharp.
Origin: The Oak-Father
An ancient druid of the Grove, calm guardian of nature’s balance.
Origin: The Conquering Soul Soul
A commanding drow champion, ruthless and unyielding in her convictions.
Origin: The Wizard of Waterdeep
A brilliant wizard from Waterdeep whose ambition almost cost him everything.
Origin: The Mad Rashemaar
A towering berserker with his hamster companion named Boo, as mad as he is mighty.
Origin: The Fury of Avernus
Karlach has escaped ten years of service in the Hells with nothing but the axe on her back and many bones to pick..
Origin: The Blade of Frontiers
The charismatic Blade of Frontiers, hero to the people and hunter of devils. City-educated and suave.
Origin: The Dark Urge
Kill. Murder. Kill. Blood. Kill. Slaughter. Kill. Kill. Kill. Make them trust you, then twist the knife. Yes. Kill. Kill.
